## Summary / 摘要 / 概要

A concise one-sentence summary of the feature.

## Motivation / 动机 / 動機

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution / 提议方案 / 提案内容

Describe the approach or API you have in mind.

```python
# Example usage of the proposed feature
```

## Alternatives Considered / 替代方案 / 検討した代替案

Have you considered other approaches? Why do you prefer the proposed solution?

## Additional Context / 附加信息 / 追加情報

Any relevant links, papers, or context.
